Player.title: Player
Player.description: Information about a player in the game

color.description: Tailwind avatar color or class name

isHost.description: Whether the player is the room host

captured.description: Record of captured skippers by color

isActive.description: Whether the player is still active/online

GameSession.title: GameSession
GameSession.description: The state of a Skippity board game

status.description: Current phase of the game session

board.description: Flattened list of 100 cells on a 10x10 board representing current colors (or null)

players.description: List of players in the game (up to 4)

currentTurnPlayerId.description: Player Id of player who has the clock

activePieceIndex.description: Active piece index for multiple jump turns, otherwise null

winnerId.description: Winning player Id or null if active

aiDifficulty.description: Difficulty of AI bot if AI mode is selected

/games/{gameId}.description: Interactive multi-player game metadata and move records
